description: Presentation-layer overlay. Maps fact IDs to resident-facing channel information: URLs, application steps, evidence checklists, change-of-circumstances obligations. Join to ct_facts.json on matching id fields.

global_contact.postal_address: Gloucester City Revenues & Benefits, Eastgate Management Suite, Eastgate Street, Gloucester, GL1 1PA

how_to_apply: Apply through My Gloucester online account
Download and email form to revenues@gloucester.gov.uk with 'Reference [Council Tax number]' in subject
Include Council Tax account reference number
single-person-discount.processing_note: Continue paying until notified of decision

change_in_circumstances.consequence: May receive amended bill and penalty charge
